description: C# program importing System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates 6.0.0 but only using X509Certificate2 constructor, never calling the vulnerable Import() method. CVE-2023-29331 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Only X509Certificate2 constructor is used to read the subject. The vulnerable Import() method is never called anywhere in source.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable Import() method is never called. Only the X509Certificate2 constructor and Subject property are used, neither of which trigger the vulnerability.
